title: Day 4 Lesson 2 - Video Repetition
html:
The focus of this repetition is on these sentences:  

Sentence 1 - こんばんなにをしますか。 (Konban nani o shimaska?) = What will you do tonight?

Sentence 2 - おんがくをききます。(Ongaku o kikimas) = I will listen to music.

Sentence 3 - それからてれびをみます。(Sore kara terebi o mimas) = Then I will watch television.

How to use this lesson - Please watch the video twice (first with the subtitles and then without them) and repeat the sentences.
